Container.Name: keyanu-frontend
Container.Overview:
Keyanu Frontend — the web UI for the Keyanu infrastructure credential manager, served by nginx and built from the `frontend/` folder of the Keyanu repository.
Requires the keyanu-backend container to be reachable at the hostname "backend" on the same custom Docker network (see nginx.conf). Create a custom bridge network named "keyanu" in Unraid's Docker settings and attach both containers to it, or adjust nginx.conf's proxy_pass target to match your setup.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the Keyanu web UI is served on
